name: NT Minerals Limited
description: NT Minerals Limited is an Australian-based, ASX-listed resource company focused on the exploration and development of mineral projects. The company holds a significant land position in the Northern Territory's McArthur Basin, which is highly prospective for copper, cobalt, and other strategic minerals. Additionally, NT Minerals maintains the Millers Creek Project in South Australia, targeting iron oxide-copper-gold (IOCG) deposits. Driven by a dedicated team, the company aims to realize value through technical expertise and exploration in regions known for hosting world-class mineral discoveries, contributing to the global demand for essential electrification elements.
